cases.description: A question about learning Obfuscate needs advancement or acquisition evidence, not a character page that happens to contain the word learn and the discipline name.
cases.question: how do I learn obfuscate

forbidden_sources.text_contains: They wanted me to learn a lesson about myself

cases.description: A Malkavian Dementation targeting question needs system or applicability evidence, not a nearby clan discipline mention.
cases.question: can malkavians use dementation on other vampires

forbidden_sources.text_contains: Malkavians do not advertise their use of Obfuscate

forbidden_answer_contains: do not advertise their use of Obfuscate

cases.description: A blood bond question needs Blood Bond definition/mechanics evidence and must not answer from unrelated Second Inquisition text.
cases.question: what are bloodbonds and how do I make use of it
